prompt: Create a cinematic surreal photorealistic scene of a young man seen from behind, standing close to a dark wooden dresser and staring into a large ornate antique gold mirror. The real person is casually dressed in a plain faded blue-gray T-shirt, with short messy brown hair, his shoulders and back softly lit. In the mirror reflection, he appears transformed into a different adult man wearing a formal gray suit jacket, black vest, white dress shirt, and black bow tie; his reflected face is obscured by a square pixelated censor block and surrounded by subtle horizontal digital glitch artifacts, suggesting an identity swap or Freaky Friday body-swap moment. The room is a moody vintage bedroom with teal patterned wallpaper, framed paintings, a polished wooden vanity, small trinkets on the surface, and two warm table lamps glowing on either side, one reflected inside the mirror and one visible at the right edge. Use a vertical 3:4 composition, over-the-shoulder viewpoint, shallow depth of field, warm amber practical lighting mixed with cool green-blue shadows, film grain, dust specks, slight lens softness, and a mysterious psychological thriller atmosphere. The mirror should be the central focus, with elaborate carved baroque details at the top and bottom, realistic reflections, no readable text, no watermark.
